_note: Example calibration set — replace with your own rated builds

taste_notes.hierarchy: The most important axis — a 5/5 hierarchy with 3/5 ambition beats 4/5 ambition with 2/5 hierarchy
taste_notes.motion: Motion design is a powerful differentiator when intentional
taste_notes.texture: Decorative texture must NOT touch primary readable text
taste_notes.anti_slop: If it looks like AI made it, it fails regardless of technical quality
